creator: lantw44@gmail.com
text:
2.44.1 is a stable release. A GNOME or GTK+ version is stable when its second number is even.

But I think GLib and GTK+ will also be updated when GNOME 3.16 is imported. You can find GNOME 3.16 ports here.
https://github.com/freebsd/freebsd-ports-gnome/tree/gnome-3.16/devel/glib20
